title: sarcopodium cheiri
intro: Sarcopodium cheiri, also known as Sarcococca hookeriana var. humilis, is a plant species within the boxwood family, Buxaceae, characterized by its evergreen leaves and small, white flowers. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be utilized to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Sarcopodium cheiri include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and promote relaxation. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas and infusions made from its leaves and stems, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
